title: How to say Deathtrue and Deathtrue
display_title: How to say Deathtrue and Deathtrue
wikitext:
[]: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by CSManiac33 » Sun Apr 19, 2020 11:25 pm I have never heard anyone ever actually say these out loud and I can get anyone to agree on it. Has there ever been any official pronunciation?

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Apr 20, 2020 3:00 am I unfortunately don't know the answer either, but I'm here to say this is a 10/10 topic.

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 20, 2020 3:27 am Personally I'd go for dɛθ truː and dɛθ truː tuː, but that's just me.

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 20, 2020 3:35 am I've never heard it said out loud, only in text messages, but I'm with Tines here; although I guess "dɛθ truː skweərd" would be equally valid there

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Keratos23 » Mon Apr 20, 2020 3:40 am I always called them "Death True" and "Death True Squared"... Even though that doesn't really make any sense, it's just how it's written.

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 20, 2020 8:20 am Based on the precedent of "Pen²", the answer is clearly "Death True True".

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Derantor » Mon Apr 20, 2020 9:04 am Japanese can be read from right to left - so the title is a toast: "To true death!" All joking aside, I am with Mr. Tines on this.

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Apr 20, 2020 10:34 am I go the Tines way - but Reichu's suggestion is quite appealing!

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 20, 2020 12:06 pm That suggestion is quite funny indeed

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 20, 2020 1:11 pm pwhodges wrote: but Reichu's suggestion is quite appealing!

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Apr 20, 2020 5:15 pm I think the things in parenthesis aren't supposed to be said.... that being said, I'd go for Death(true) = Death Times True Death(true)² = Death Times Truest

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by CSManiac33 » Mon Apr 20, 2020 5:30 pm I have always said it as Death True and Death True Two but I did think it could be Death by True and Death by Second True or something. I also think Death by Truth has a nice ring to it but it says True and not Truth.

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Apr 24, 2020 4:21 pm This topic is amazing and Reichu’s answer is the best. I’ve always called it simply “Death and Rebirth,” since that was the original title. For the longest time I only had Manga Entertainment’s release of Death (True) 2 , and the words “Death and Rebirth” would simply refer to the only copy/version I had of that film at the time. This isn’t the case anymore, since I bought the Blu-ray box set. My tradition of calling it “Death and Rebirth” still continues, I just now need to choose which version I’m referring to when I say it. My answer isn’t helpful at all, but there it is.

[]: Re: How to say Death(true) and Death(true)²             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Apr 24, 2020 7:50 pm It's clearly "Death True to the power of True"
